scenes.description: Group performance of the song 'GIRLS' LEGEND U'.
Transition interlude with fireworks and stage lighting effects.
Solo performance of the song 'STARTING OVER' by Omaru Polka.

subtitles.original: 夏も秋も冬も越え 願え 焦がれ 走れ
subtitles.english: Transcending summer, autumn, and winter, wish, yearn, and run

subtitles.original: Ah 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Ah, towards victory

subtitles.original: 未来 描き 彩 目指し 狙い 挑め つかめ Winning
subtitles.english: Drawing the future, coloring it, aiming, challenging, and seizing victory

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっと想い 夢はきっと叶うから
subtitles.english: Holding onto this feeling forever, because dreams will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日に君が流した 涙も信じて
subtitles.english: Believe even in the tears you shed that day

subtitles.original: 雨も風も雲も闇も越え 願え 焦がれ 走れ
subtitles.english: Transcending rain, wind, clouds, and darkness, wish, yearn, and run

subtitles.original: Ah 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Ah, towards victory

subtitles.original: Non-stop! Non-stop to finish!
subtitles.english: Non-stop! Non-stop to finish!

subtitles.original: STARTING OVER
subtitles.english: STARTING OVER

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... my destiny
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... my destiny

subtitles.original: It's finally the true end
subtitles.english: It's finally the true end

subtitles.original: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER
subtitles.english: I'm ready for... STARTING OVER

subtitles.original: やっと幕を下ろせた 最後の瞬間まで
subtitles.english: I was finally able to lower the curtain until the final moment

subtitles.original: わたしは精一杯に わたしをやりきった
subtitles.english: I did my best to be myself to the fullest

subtitles.original: 終演の続きは 誰も知らなくていい
subtitles.english: No one needs to know what happens after the show ends

subtitles.original: 涙を置いて 新しい旅に出よう
subtitles.english: Leave the tears behind and set out on a new journey

subtitles.original: 熱狂はあなたを選ぶ 違う結末だっただけ
subtitles.english: The enthusiasm chose you, it was just a different ending

subtitles.original: 同じ愛になれなかった Destiny
subtitles.english: Destiny that couldn't become the same love

subtitles.original: これまでの全てを 差し出すような愛だった
subtitles.english: It was a love that seemed to give up everything until now

subtitles.original: 世界の意味が変わるくらいに 肯定された気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I felt so affirmed that it was as if the meaning of the world had changed

subtitles.original: 何気なさの中で 気づけた最初の奇跡が
subtitles.english: The first miracle I noticed in the midst of casualness

subtitles.original: あなたでよかった わたしでよかった 心から思えたよ
subtitles.english: I'm glad it was you, I'm glad it was me, I felt that from the bottom of my heart

subtitles.original: ずっと遠い未来も ちゃんと覚えていよう
subtitles.english: Let's remember properly even in the far-off future

subtitles.original: 自分の抱きしめかた 明日の願いかた
subtitles.english: How to embrace myself, how to wish for tomorrow

subtitles.original: あなたがいなくても わたしの片隅で
subtitles.english: Even if you are not here, in a corner of my heart

subtitles.original: 優しい光 消えたりしないとわかる
subtitles.english: I know the gentle light will not fade away

subtitles.original: 今はまだ手を振れるほど 道は別れたばかりで
subtitles.english: I can still wave my hand, the paths have only just parted

subtitles.original: 後ろ髪に風を感じながら
subtitles.english: While feeling the wind in my hair from behind

subtitles.original: それまでの全てが あなたに出会うためだった
subtitles.english: Everything until then was to meet you

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないこと 本当の意味で知れたから
subtitles.english: Because I learned in the true sense that no moment is wasted

subtitles.original: 次の曲がり角も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next corner as myself

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる 新しい一歩 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Let's believe and start walking a new step that leads to sometime

subtitles.original: 心から誰かを愛せた あの日々は
subtitles.english: Those days when I could love someone from the bottom of my heart

subtitles.original: 間違いなくわたしの Destiny Ah
subtitles.english: Are definitely my destiny, ah

subtitles.original: これまでの全てが 新しい力をくれる
subtitles.english: Everything until now gives me new strength

subtitles.original: どの瞬間もムダじゃないなら 何が起きても大丈夫だから
subtitles.english: If no moment is wasted, then everything will be alright no matter what happens

subtitles.original: 次の物語も 自分らしさで選べるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to choose the next story as myself

subtitles.original: いつかに繋がる わたしのはじまり 信じて歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Let's believe and start walking my beginning that leads to sometime
